GOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

Label the parts of the female urinary/reproductive system. (0.5 points) Label the structures of the breasts. (0.25 points) HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 137

Label the structures of the uterus. (0.25 points) 138 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB ACTIVITIES A list of words is provided below that you are expected to identify, learn, and label on the models provided. Note that not all models will have some of the organs/structures, so be sure to find them on an alternate model. You must use all the words provided. Using the colored tape provided, write the number that corresponds to the organ/structure and place them on your model. When complete, notify your TA so they may check your work. For each additional station, directions will be provided for the activity. STATION ONE: URIN
